result.name: Thorga Bone-Singer

sections.setting: Lands of Legends: A mythic fantasy world shaped by ancient migrations, damaged Gates, and conflicting origin myths. Tone and style: Epic, mystical, grounded, ancient-but-lived-in, high fantasy with mythic ambiguity. Cultures feel old, layered, and internally consistent. Core world truths: The Alfirin are immortal exiles who entered this world through Gates after a failed negotiation with the Velim, damaging reality. The Velim are ancient custodians of Gates and thresholds, forced into guardianship after the Alfirin passage went wrong. History is fragmented; myths contradict; no single culture is fully correct. Cultural themes: ancient wounds still shaping the present, survival over destiny, balance versus permanence, quiet guardianship versus visible power, myth over absolute truth.
sections.character: Thorga Bone-Singer, male uruk conqueror, Lowland Uruk
sections.appearance: protruding lower tusks, powerful build, heavy jaw, immense physical presence, green skin, scarred martial bearing, dominant scarred presence, commanding gaze, disciplined posture, mood of Gruesome
sections.clothing: tribal leathers, war gear, symbolic adornment, disciplined war armor, conquest trophies, heavy armor, war trophies, rank insignia
sections.environment: War-scarred plains dotted with ruined keeps, broken roads, fortified villages, and mercenary camps. Civilization persists here through pragmatism and stubborn tradition.
sections.race_flavor: Core truths: Powerful nomadic peoples who arrived suddenly from the east.; Often misunderstood by outsiders.. Themes: strength paired with culture, honor misunderstood, reputation shaped by fear. Tone: physical, proud, intense. Visual cues: scale much larger than humans; signature features protruding lower tusks, powerful build, heavy jaw, immense physical presence. Variant tone: militant conquerors. Avoid: reducing them to mindless brutes.
sections.style: painted british comic illustration, gritty graphic novel art, heavy ink outlines, thick painterly brush strokes, high contrast saturated colors, dramatic low-angle perspective, exaggerated anatomy, chaotic layered backgrounds, heavy shadows, glowing highlights, metal textures and worn surfaces, dark fantasy graphic novel illustration

result.prompt_text:
Dark fantasy character prompt.

Setting:
Lands of Legends: A mythic fantasy world shaped by ancient migrations, damaged Gates, and conflicting origin myths. Tone and style: Epic, mystical, grounded, ancient-but-lived-in, high fantasy with mythic ambiguity. Cultures feel old, layered, and internally consistent. Core world truths: The Alfirin are immortal exiles who entered this world through Gates after a failed negotiation with the Velim, damaging reality. The Velim are ancient custodians of Gates and thresholds, forced into guardianship after the Alfirin passage went wrong. History is fragmented; myths contradict; no single culture is fully correct. Cultural themes: ancient wounds still shaping the present, survival over destiny, balance versus permanence, quiet guardianship versus visible power, myth over absolute truth.

Character:
Thorga Bone-Singer, male uruk conqueror, Lowland Uruk.

Appearance:
protruding lower tusks, powerful build, heavy jaw, immense physical presence, green skin, scarred martial bearing, dominant scarred presence, commanding gaze, disciplined posture, mood of Gruesome.

Clothing:
tribal leathers, war gear, symbolic adornment, disciplined war armor, conquest trophies, heavy armor, war trophies, rank insignia.

Weapons / Props:
mace, banners.

Pose:
commanding stance, mood of Gruesome.

Environment:
War-scarred plains dotted with ruined keeps, broken roads, fortified villages, and mercenary camps. Civilization persists here through pragmatism and stubborn tradition.

Lighting:
burning sky light.

Race Flavor:
Core truths: Powerful nomadic peoples who arrived suddenly from the east.; Often misunderstood by outsiders.. Themes: strength paired with culture, honor misunderstood, reputation shaped by fear. Tone: physical, proud, intense. Visual cues: scale much larger than humans; signature features protruding lower tusks, powerful build, heavy jaw, immense physical presence. Variant tone: militant conquerors. Avoid: reducing them to mindless brutes.

STYLE:
painted british comic illustration, gritty graphic novel art, heavy ink outlines, thick painterly brush strokes, high contrast saturated colors, dramatic low-angle perspective, exaggerated anatomy, chaotic layered backgrounds, heavy shadows, glowing highlights, metal textures and worn surfaces, dark fantasy graphic novel illustration.

modifications: Leadership and intimidation as one level higher
Might defense as one level higher
combat: Nearby subordinates may act immediately on its command at GM discretion
interaction: Dominant, disciplined, and accustomed to obedience
